Appearances: Ernest Der for Debra Dolch.

Mr. Der agrees with the Court's suggestion of approving the accounting and bifurcating the issue of final distribution/termination to a future date. The Fourth Account, etc. is taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y. S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Mr. Der reported that there had been a misunderstanding, that they have received the accounting and are currently preparing the petition and asked for a two week continuance. The status on filing an accounting petition was continued to August 25, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.
